frothy menu — choose common Frothy workflows from a numbered terminal menu

Menu is a small numbered guide for common Frothy workflows. It does not own device, build, flash, or serial behavior; it prints the equivalent command and runs the existing verb. Use it when you want help choosing the next step, then graduate to the verbs it shows.

Examples:
  frothy menu
      open the numbered setup, connect, and recovery menu

Flags:
